steps.t: Sigeric has told you that the trail of the man he spotted begins outside the south gate of Snowbourn.
The trail can be found along the road south and east of Snowbourn. The trail has been cold so far, but in the interest of Snowbourn, you should keep s…
The crofts can be found just off the road far to the south-east of Snowbourn. Having found a banner of the White Hand, you should investigate the near…
The barn can be found among the croftlands to the south-east of Snowbourn. Following the trail from Snowbourn, you have found yourself outside a barn.
You have found Sigeric outside the barn, and he looks quite pleased to see you. You should speak to him and discover why he sent you on this hunt.
Fastred can be found inside the Mead Hall of Snowbourn. You have bested Sigeric, the man you rescued from Orcs near Garsfeld, and now the Rohirrim hav…
